title: Adoption of minors
doc_html:
SECTION 2.  ADOPTION OF MINORS

Art. 200.  Adoption of minors

The adoption of minors is also governed by the provisions of the Children's Code.

Acts 2009, No. 3, §1, eff. June 9, 2009.
